agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The Mill Hill Conservation Area boundary was extracted from two map pages (9 and 10) representing the North/West and South/East sections of the area. Page 9 was matched with 820 inliers near Mill Hill School Foundation, and Page 10 was matched with 480 inliers near the junction of High Street and The Ridgeway. Both matches showed excellent scale consistency (approx 0.98) and strong road name agreement. The final result is the union of these two sections, covering the full extent of the Article 4 Direction area. Page 12 was a wide overview and was not required for the final projection as the detail pages provided superior clarity.
